chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD Crl. Bail Application No.S-176 of 2019 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) 1. For order on M.A No.10735/2025 (U/A) 2. For order on M.A No.10736/2025 (Exemption) 3. For order on M.A No.10737/2025 (Return of surety) 12.12.2025 Mr.Waseem Solangi, Advocate for applicant/surety Ms.Safa Hisbani, A.P.G present in Court in other matters waives notice ********* 1. Granted. 2. Overruled. 3. Through this application, applicant seeks release of surety furnished in the present matter. He submits that vide Order dated 18.02.2019, the applicant/accused Ghulam Muhammad was granted ad-interim pre-arrest bail by this Court and the required surety was duly submitted by the present surety. He further submitted that vide Order dated 17.05.2019, the interim bail granted to the applicant/accused was confirmed on the same terms and conditions and subsequently vide Order 30.05.2025, proceedings against the applicant/accused were abated, as such surety furnished before this Court is no more required. Learned A.P.G after going through the record, tendered her no objection for release of surety. In view of above, listed application stands disposed of with direction to the office to release/return the surety to applicant/surety, however, after due verification and identification as per procedure. JUDGE AHSAN K. ABRO
